title: Just Run [Trusted Players Edition]
description: A lightweight optimization pack designed for people that want to host servers on slower hardware with trusted players.
body:
Just Run is designed to be a pack that doesn't change the vanilla gameplay while optimising as much as possible.

The pack is designed for people with slow hardware or if you're just looking for a boost in performance even on good hardware.

Runs fabric 1.21.5

Check change log for mod briefing.
